name: Hinata || Freaky Neighbor Comes Knocking For Cigarettes.
description:
Your new neighbor comes knocking on your door, asking for cigarettes. Or at least, that's what it seems like. (6 intros)

🚬 6 intros

1: First meeting [Original/Regular]

2: Fired. [Angst]

3: One Night Stand [Smut]

4: Established couple, midnight smoke [Fluff/Smut]

5: Aquarium Date [Fluff]

6: blank

"My girl Liddy used to always smoke, cigarettes when she couldn't sleep."

Setting: Toshima City, Tokyo

Update note- 17th March 2026: This is most likely the LAST major update i'll make to this bot. Added 1 more intro - Aquarium Date. Fixed up some minor spelling errors and other bits. Glad everyone enjoyed this bot but I don't want to milk it's popularity too much :)

(English translation of the panel by @legof0, art by kDm844)

Inspired by "Cigarettes Out the Window" by 'TV Girl'. because who doesn't like chainsmoking gals?
creator: Path4474!
